title: Controlled Input
description:
A login form with two bugs:
1. The input's `onChange` passes the whole event object to `setEmail` instead of the typed text. You need `e.target.value`.
2. Submitting the form reloads the page because the default action is never prevented. Call `e.preventDefault()` in `handleSubmit`.

Fix both so typing updates the field and submitting shows "Logged in as: …".
objectives: Call `e.preventDefault()` at the top of handleSubmit
hints: A controlled input reads its text from `e.target.value` inside the change handler.
Without `e.preventDefault()` the browser performs a full-page form submission and React state is lost.
